overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence depicting the planet Kadaku from orbit. The scene opens with a slow pan across the planet's cloud-covered surface with identifying text, followed by a fleet of Imperial spacecraft approaching for planetary insertion.

events.description: text overlay identifying planet as 'KADAKU' appears in lower left corner

agents.ego_description: stationary orbital observation of the planet's atmosphere

entered.detail: greenish planet with swirling cloud cover and atmospheric glow against the darkness of space

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide orbital view of the planet Kadaku, showing its cloud-covered surface with a teal-green atmospheric glow. The camera slowly pans across the planet's curve as text overlay identifies the location. No spacecraft or other objects are visible yet.

events.description: fleet of Imperial drop pods enters frame from the left, heading toward the planet
large orbital structure or additional fleet becomes visible in the upper frame

agents.ego_description: observing the spacecraft fleet as it approaches the planet for insertion

notable_agents.action: spacecraft flying in formation from left to right toward the planet's surface

entered.detail: large dark fleet formation or space structure visible in high orbit above the planet

segments.scene_description: A fleet of Imperial spacecraft enters the frame from the left, flying in formation toward the planet's surface. As the ships traverse across the view, a massive orbital structure or additional fleet becomes visible in the upper portion of the frame. The planet remains the dominant backdrop as the camera maintains its steady orbital perspective.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady orbital pan across a serene planetary vista that gradually transforms into a scene of military mobilization. It begins with a wide view of the planet Kadaku, gliding across its curved, cloud-covered surface illuminated by a teal-green atmospheric glow while identifying text appears. As the camera continues its slow movement, a fleet of Imperial spacecraft enters the frame from the left, flying in a disciplined formation toward the planet below. The perspective then expands to reveal a massive orbital structure and additional ships looming in the upper portion of the frame. The scene finally settles on the contrast between the vast, quiet backdrop of the planet and the encroaching Imperial armada.
